title: Necromancer
original_title: จอมขมังเวทย์
overview: Using his powerful knowledge of black magic, corrupt former cop and necromancer Itti manages to escape from prison. The case is assigned to Lieutenant Santi, who is tasked with tracking down the escapee. Sensing Itti's supernatural powers, Santi soon realizes that to confront and capture him, he will have to transform himself into a necromancer.
